title: Leadership Development * Older Adults - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Leadership Development * Older Adults 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Older Adults Immigrants Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF IMMIGRANT AND REFUGEE COMMUNITY ORGANIZATION IRCO SENIOR SERVICES CENTER SENIOR SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides home delivered meals, naturalization assistance, homebound assistance, limited transportation assistance, case management, health and wellness activities, and focal point leadership for older adults and their caregivers. An Information and Assistance specialist is available to provide information and referrals. 10165 SE Cherry Blossom Drive Portland, OR 97216 Eligibility: Age 60 and older. Some services have income eligibility criteria. Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Meals: Varies (503) 484-8800 Get Directions Visit Website More Details IMMIGRANT AND REFUGEE COMMUNITY ORGANIZATION SENIOR SERVICES
